Inbound traffic over public networks per second

You can view this metric if public access has been enabled for the instance.

panels.description:
Outbound traffic over public networks per second

You can view this metric if public access has been enabled for the instance.

panels.title: Average Disk Read Time

panels.description:
Number of bytes created per second

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Message Creation

panels.description:
Number of bytes retrieved per second

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Message Retrieval

panels.description:
Total size of messages in the queue

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Message Size

panels.description:
Total number of messages in the queue

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Total Messages

panels.description:
Number of messages created per second

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Message Creation Rate

panels.description:
Total number of messages in the partition

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Partition monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Partition Messages

panels.description:
Number of messages that have been created

This metric is available only when **Monitoring Type** is set to **Partition monitoring** on the **By Topic** tab page.
panels.title: Created Messages

panels.description:
Number of messages that have been retrieved in the consumer group

This metric is available only when **Topic** is set to a specific topic name and **Monitoring Type** is set to **Partition monitoring** on the **By Consumer Group** tab page.
panels.title: Retrieved Messages

panels.description:
Number of messages that can be retrieved in the consumer group

This metric is available only when **Topic** is set to a specific topic name and **Monitoring Type** is set to **Partition monitoring** on the **By Consumer Group** tab page.
panels.title: Available Messages

panels.description:
Number of remaining messages that can be retrieved from the specified topic in the consumer group

This metric is available only when **Topic** is set to a specific topic name and **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Consumer Group** tab page.
panels.title: Topic Available Messages

panels.description:
Number of messages that have been retrieved from the specified topic in the consumer group

This metric is available only when **Topic** is set to a specific topic name and **Monitoring Type** is set to **Basic monitoring** on the **By Consumer Group** tab page.
panels.title: Topic Retrieved Messages

panels.description:
Number of remaining messages that can be retrieved in the consumer group

This metric is available only when **Topic** is set to **All topics** on the **By Consumer Group** tab page.
panels.title: Consumer Available Messages

panels.description:
Number of messages that have been retrieved in the consumer group

This metric is available only when **Topic** is set to **All topics** on the **By Consumer Group** tab page.
panels.title: Consumer Retrieved Messages

panels.description: Data to synchronize in the Kafka migration task
panels.title: Kafka Data to Sync

panels.description: Data synchronized per minute in the Kafka migration task
panels.title: Kafka Data Synced per Minute

panels.description: Status of the current task
panels.title: Task Status

panels.description: Time elapsed between when a message is sent from the source and received by the target
panels.title: Message Delay
